case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. VICTORIA CHEEVES ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NICHOLE SANTIAGO IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND CLERKS JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEVES, VICTORIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEEVES, VICTORIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 904 CONNECTICUT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ***PLEASE INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEVES, VICTORIA
